summary: Zeyneb did very good. Excellent. She was repeating everything in full structures.

Zayneb continues to bring a positive and confident energy to the classroom. She is consistently eager to participate and shows enthusiasm across all activities, including story retelling, charades and workbook activities. Zayneb regularly volunteers answers and stays engaged throughout tasks, contributing to a focused and productive learning environment. Activities such as Can you please....examples, running, jumping, hiking. 

Zayneb has made outstanding progress in her learning and shows a very secure understanding of the topics covered. She consistently answers questions correctly, uses complete sentences, and helps to repeat and retell the story. She remembers what Marcia needs to wear to go to certain places.

Zayneb's behaviour in class is excellent. She follows instructions well, works calmly through workbook activities, and remains focused during group games. She is cooperative and supportive, often helping the class by repeating parts of the story and contributing appropriately during discussions. Her positive attitude contributes to a smooth and productive classroom environment.
She pushes herself to always give her very best.
